name: y2k-neon
title: Y2K-neon JUICY — overlay-wash + scan-lines + chromatic sweep + edge bands
hypothesis: Aggressive Y2K post-FX stack (saturated pink↔cyan overlay-blend wash + 4px alternating scan-lines + scrolling chromatic-aberration sweep + violet vignette + pink-top/cyan-bottom edge bands) creates a high-saturation TikTok/Reels thumb-stop palette signature without altering gameplay legibility or Sami's endcard juice.
diff_from_baseline: NEW playable/y2k_overlay.js (~70 LOC) exporting applyY2KPostFX(ctx, t) — 5-pass post-FX
Pass 1 — Diagonal pink→violet→cyan gradient wash, overlay blend, breathing alpha 0.65±0.12 @ 0.8Hz (saturated rather than soft-light to keep colors punchy)
Pass 2 — Horizontal scan-lines every 4px (white 10% + black 18% interleaved) — overlay blend → CRT/Y2K signature
Pass 3 — Chromatic aberration sweep — pink/cyan band scrolling vertically @ 180px/s, screen blend (lighter)
Pass 4 — Violet radial vignette (rgba 60,20,120,0.55), multiply blend, focuses gaze on castles
Pass 5 — Pink top edge band + cyan bottom edge band (60px each, lighter blend) — TikTok creative-tier framing signature
playable/script.js — 1 import + applyY2KPostFX(ctx, t) at top of _paintOverlay, gated to skip endcard + forcewin so Sami's shimmer/confetti/flash stay clean
juicy_checklist_validated: color-shift continuous: pink→violet→cyan diagonal wash with breathing alpha pulse @ 0.8Hz
particles/lines 2+: alternating 4px scan-lines (white+black interleaved) covering full canvas
glow-bloom: pink top band + cyan bottom band in 'lighter' composite operation
trail persistence: chromatic-aberration sweep scrolling vertically continuously @ 180px/s
layered blending 5+: overlay (wash), overlay (scanlines), screen (sweep), multiply (vignette), lighter (edge bands) — all stacked
juicy_omitted: screen-shake: out of axis — palette overlay should not move the underlying image (gameplay legibility)
scale-punch lettering: out of axis — no new diegetic copy for palette variation
